title: ShulkerOpener
description: Open shulker boxes directly from your hand or inventory. No placement needed.
body:
**Shulker Opener** lets you access shulker box contents without placing them down.

## How to use:

- Hold a shulker box and press Shift + RMB to open it
- Right-click any shulker box in your inventory to open it directly
- Changes are saved automatically when you close the inventory.

## Why use it?
- No more placing shulkers on the ground
- Quick access while mining, building, or exploring
- Works in survival and creative

## Community
